```
(def email (insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Incident" :body (str "Sentry issue: " (:id top-issue) "\nAcknowledged incidents: " (join ", " incident-ids))}))
{:service service :sentry_id (:id top-issue) :acknowledged (count incident-ids) :ack_results ack-results :linear_id (:id linear-issue)}
```
